Share card = settled card · photo crop anchors on the plane

2026-07-05 · branch feat/share-settled-focus · PR #104 · renders are real SwiftUI via ImageRenderer

1 · The crop fix, demonstrated

Synthetic catch photo: sky gradient with a ringed “plane” marker at normalized (0.72, 0.22) — high in the frame, like every real upward shot. Left: the old center crop pushes the plane out of the hero (only the ring’s bottom edge grazes the top border). Right: the crop now anchors on the bracket center the composer already computes, persisted per catch.

Old catches have no stored focus → they keep the center crop (the plane position can’t be recovered after the fact). Every catch from this build forward stores it.

2 · The share image is now the settled card

What friends receive = the card you see, wrapped in minimal chrome: wordmark + tier up top, the seal below. Left: full route + first-of-type. Right: routeless GA common — the quiet floor of the design.

Behavior notes

• The focus point is the same bracket center drawn into the JPEG — one source of truth (CatchPhotoComposer.Composed.normalizedFocus).
• RevealPhoto now clips its own fill (share renders showed the oversize image bleeding past the card under ImageRenderer).
• Planespotters heroes on photo-less catches render again via AsyncImage (they’d silently regressed to the sky placeholder in Direction B).
